scrutiny_note.description: One-line scrutiny / calibration summary (contributor tier, gittensor association, etc.).

summary_markdown.description: Markdown body for the sticky comment that goes between the verdict header and the findings table. Do NOT include the verdict line, the findings table, the prior-reconciliation list, or the conclusion — those are rendered by the post-script.

conclusion_markdown.description: One- or two-sentence verdict justification rendered as the sticky's final paragraph.

inline_findings.description: Findings pinned to a specific line in the PR diff. Each becomes an inline PR review comment.

path.description: File path as it appears in the PR diff.

line.description: Diff line number; use the new-file line for RIGHT side, old-file line for LEFT.

start_line.description: First line of a multi-line range. Null for single-line findings.

side.description: RIGHT for added/context lines, LEFT for removed lines.

title.description: Short headline (used as the table row title and the inline comment header).

body_markdown.description: Markdown body of the inline comment. Do NOT include a ```suggestion fence here — put replacement code in `suggestion`.

suggestion.description: Optional replacement text. When non-null, the post-script wraps it in a ```suggestion fence so GitHub renders the 'Apply suggestion' button. Lines in the suggestion replace lines start_line..line (or just `line` when start_line is null).

off_diff_findings.description: Findings that cannot be pinned to a diff line (e.g. 'missing test file entirely', 'PR description is wrong'). Rendered as a list under '## Other findings'.

approximate_location.description: Free-form hint like 'pallets/foo/' or 'PR body' when applicable.

proposed_pr_body.description: Auditor-only. When the existing PR body is empty or trivial, populate this with a proposed PR description (full markdown, ready to drop into the body). The post-script PATCHes the PR body with this content ONLY when the current body is empty/trivial. Skeptic always sets this to null.

prior_reconciliation.description: One entry for each finding in the prior sticky comment (read from /tmp/ai-review-context/prior-<persona>-comment.md, which has finding IDs in HTML comment markers like <!-- fid:abc12345 -->). Skip if no prior comment exists.

prior_finding_id.description: The finding ID from the prior sticky's <!-- fid:... --> marker.
